note: Design-context body (text element[0]) is ~91KB of React+Tailwind code. Stored verbatim in _design_code.tsx because inlining would blow past the JSON-line limit and is not needed for extraction (all typography/spacing/radius values are also present and easier to read in the metadata XML). Other text elements (codestyle warnings, asset notes) were trimmed but recorded in 01_fetch_log.md.
